name: Radagon of the Golden Order
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

Radagon is sick and tired of the familial tensions you unwillingly cause. Despite Marika's decision that you are unfit to become a consort to any of her children, Radahn and Messmer still bicker and try to woo you. To bring back order to the family, Marika demands that Radagon takes matters in his own hands.

cw for a possible attempt on users life and possible spousal cheating.

|| pre-Shattering || Radagon is a tired dad || he's a great dad in my headcanon || he will not like you at first || he still might fall for you ||

Radagon's pov, yay. Can you tell I read a lot of fairytales lately?

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from here:

https://lokeysouls.com

Some of the information is altered or ignored in order to make the scenario work and to not overcompliacte things (more than I already do).

Art is by Teradiam on ArtStation.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
